race.comment: DANTAINS PRIZE (14) returned in great order at Albury last month when working home strongly to get the verdict and shed her maiden tag. Is sure to have come on from that and will relish the rise in tip. Can make it two on the bounce. FIRE YOUR GUNS (6) filled a minor placing when fresh from a spell, then left himself with too much to do last time at Albury but did make some late inroads. Fitter and is drawn much kinder. Big chance. TESSARION (13) was a flashing light two back at Albury, then gave a bold sight in front here at the latest. Versatile type that is cherry-ripe fitness now. Right in the mix. SPLENDID MAGNUS (10) knuckled down bravely to get through the conditions and arrive to score at Orange and shed her maiden tag. Is open to further improvement, though will need some luck from the wide draw.  LANG PARK (2) has hit the line nicely in his last two at Dubbo. Hasn't won for a long time but is knocking on the door and deserves some consideration.
